goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'city centre north b and b'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 14:00' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'broxbourne'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'departure time', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
